description: Checklist configuration — controls which checklist is active for this project

availableChecklists.name: checklist.json
availableChecklists.description: Full reliance-grade audit checklist v3.0 — 38 rules across 10 sections with confidence scoring. Designed for use with soul.md + skill.md + skill-mining.md.

availableChecklists.name: checklist-mvp.json
availableChecklists.description: MVP checklist — 18 rules covering Section 5 (three-statement integration) only. Use for quick validation or testing.

switchInstructions: To switch to MVP checklist for testing: cp checklists/checklist-mvp.json config/checklist.json. To switch back to full: cp checklists/checklist.json config/checklist.json
